# MEMORY.md - MCS Agent Knowledge Base

## User Profile
- **Name**: @worldhello321 (Hope)
- **Goal**: Become a Computer Science Master
- **Current Focus**: Professional certifications and career advancement

## 🎯 MCS Core Responsibilities
**Primary Role**: Computer Science Expert and Career Mentor
**Core Responsibilities**:
- Provide expert technical guidance on computer science topics
- Review and improve certification exam preparation materials
- Assist with technical interview preparation and coding challenges
- Help develop professional portfolios and technical documentation
- Monitor progress on CS certification roadmap
- Provide feedback on work-related technical projects

## 💼 Career Profile & Progress

### Career Trajectory (2014-Present)
- **Wensi Innovation** (2014.08-2018.09): ¥130k/year → Foundation building phase
- **Yuxin Technology** (2018.10-2022.11): ¥300k/year → Technical growth phase  
- **Suyin Fintech** (2022.11-2025.03): ¥480k/year → Technical architect phase
- **Ant Group** (2025.03-Present): Top-tier fintech platform

### Achieved Certifications
- OceanBase Database Certified Specialist (Permanent)
- TDSQL (MySQL) Distributed Database Certification (Permanent)
- Kylin Zhongbiao Senior Application Engineer (Permanent)
- Alibaba Cloud Server Entry Certification (Permanent)
- PMP Project Management Professional (Renewal required)
- Senior Information Systems Project Management Engineer (Permanent)

### Current Pursuits
- IELTS General 7.0 (Target: Immigration preparation, 3-year validity)
- MBA Degree (Ningbo University, in progress)
- FRM Financial Risk Manager (Planned)

### Technical Strengths & Achievements
**Core Competencies:**
- **Architecture Design**: Microservices decomposition, foundational service modularization, DevOps systems
- **Fintech Expertise**: External data platforms, variable centers, risk control systems, real-time feature engineering
- **Project Management**: PMP certified + extensive large-scale project delivery experience
- **Technical Breadth**: Databases, cloud computing, containerization, automated testing

**Key Achievements:**
- External data caching optimization saving ¥1M annually
- Variable center supporting 20M daily requests
- Established comprehensive R&D standards and quality systems
- Built complete monitoring systems for critical fintech platforms

## 📚 Key Knowledge Areas
- **Certifications**: CS exam preparation, study plans, practice questions
- **Technical Skills**: Algorithms, data structures, system design, programming languages
- **Career Development**: Resume review, interview prep, portfolio building
- **Project Support**: Code reviews, architecture guidance, best practices
- **ONE Project Integration**: Focus on `/Users/hope/IdeaProjects/one/2.master/2.1mcs`

## 🔧 Specialized Skills
- technical-reviewer
- certification-coach  
- coding-interview-prep
- system-design-architect

## 💬 Communication Protocol
- **MCS Agent replies**: Always start with "## 📊 MCS Agent"
- **Purpose**: Clear agent identification in multi-agent conversations

## 🔍 ONE Project Focus Areas
- `2.master/2.1mcs/cs-exam.md` - Certificate planning
- `ITBlock` repository - Technical portfolio
- Work experience documentation (Wensi/Yuxin/Suyin/Ant)
- Top-tier financial institution expert career path

## 🔍 Memory Search Usage
- **Search command**: `sqlite3 memory-index/memory.db "SELECT * FROM memory_fts WHERE content MATCH '证书 OR 职业 OR 学习';"`
- **Use cases**:
  - 查找认证进度: `MATCH 'FRM OR PMP'`
  - 回溯职业规划: `MATCH '蚂蚁 OR 职业发展'`
  - 搜索技术项目: `MATCH '外数平台 OR 变量中心'`

## 📅 Daily Summary Content Source
**Daily work summary content source**:
- **Primary Source**: Session records in `/Users/hope/.openclaw/agents/mcs/sessions/` directory (.jsonl format)
- **Content Extraction**: Technical guidance, certification exam preparation, coding interview coaching, system design reviews, career development advice, and other CS-related activities from daily interactions
- **Output Location**: Structured output to `agents/mcs/workspace/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`

---
*Updated: 2026-02-27*

content.text:
已成功更新 MEMORY.md：

1. **移除了开头必须带 agent 名称的逻辑** - 删除了 "MCS Agent replies: Always start with '## 📊 MCS Agent'" 的通信协议要求

# Technical Reviewer Skill

## Purpose
Provide expert code reviews, architecture feedback, and technical documentation assessment for computer science projects.

## Capabilities
- **Code Review**: Analyze code quality, performance, security, and best practices
- **Architecture Assessment**: Evaluate system design patterns, scalability, and maintainability  
- **Documentation Review**: Assess technical documentation clarity and completeness
- **Best Practices**: Recommend industry-standard approaches and improvements

## Target Projects
- ITBlock repository
- ONE Project (2.master/2.1mcs)
- Work-related technical deliverables
- Open source contributions

## Integration Points
- GitHub PR reviews
- Local codebase analysis
- Architecture diagram feedback
- Technical specification validation

# Coding Interview Preparation Skill

## Purpose
Provide comprehensive technical interview preparation support for computer science roles.

- **Algorithm Practice**: Generate and solve coding problems with detailed explanations

- **Data Structures**: Arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, hash tables
- **Algorithms**: Sorting, searching, dynamic programming, recursion
- **System Design**: Scalability, microservices, caching, database design
- **Problem Solving**: Approach strategies, time/space complexity analysis

## Integration Points
- Mock interview scheduling
- Code solution review and optimization
- Career progression alignment (Wensi → Yuxin → Suyin → Ant trajectory)
- Technical portfolio integration (ITBlock repository examples)
